AK.name: Alaska
AK.methodology_detail: Pays percentage of Medicare rates. Historically among the highest Medicaid rates.

AL.name: Alabama
AL.methodology_detail: Uses Medicare RBRVS with state-specific CF. Pays from Allowed Amount column.

AR.name: Arkansas
AR.methodology_detail: Uses Medicare RBRVS methodology. Publishes PDF fee schedules.

AZ.name: Arizona
AZ.methodology_detail: AHCCCS fee schedule uses RBRVS methodology with nonfacility rates.

CA.name: California
CA.methodology_detail: Medi-Cal uses its own fee schedule methodology. Historically low rates.

CO.name: Colorado
CO.methodology_detail: Uses Medicare RBRVS with Total Allowable Amount. Newline chars in headers.

CT.name: Connecticut
CT.methodology_detail: Attachment 4.19-B annually updates physician fee schedule with HCPCS updates.

DE.name: Delaware
DE.methodology_detail: Pays percentage of Medicare physician fee schedule rates.

FL.name: Florida
FL.methodology_detail: Uses CMS RBRVS with state-specific CFs by service category. Rate cannot have both facility rate AND PC/TC split (must be one or the other). Flagged codes: 46924, 91124, 91125.
FL.cf_notes: Category-specific CFs per SPA FL-24-0002. Rates also subject to +/-10% annual guardrail, FSI multiplier (1.04), and FCSO locale weighting.

GA.name: Georgia
GA.methodology_detail: State-developed fee schedule with enhanced E&M rates at Medicare levels. SPA 25-0003 lists specific E&M codes at CY2014 Medicare rates.

IL.name: Illinois
IL.methodology_detail: Practitioner fee schedule with add-on payments for psych and primary care. Quality incentive payments for postpartum care. Uses unit price columns.

IN.name: Indiana
IN.methodology_detail: Uses RBRVS methodology. Publishes text file and xlsx. Anesthesia uses base units (not dollar rates). Fixed-width text format.

KY.name: Kentucky
KY.methodology_detail: Uses RBRVS with 'Pricing' column. Headers: Proc Mod, Office Fees, Facility Fees.
KY.cf_notes: Codified in 907 KAR 3:010 (eff. March 2023). Anesthesia: (procedure RVU + time units) x $15.20.

LA.name: Louisiana
LA.methodology_detail: Pays percentage of Medicare physician fee schedule.

MD.name: Maryland
MD.methodology_detail: Uses RBRVS methodology with facility/nonfacility split.

ME.name: Maine
ME.methodology_detail: Pays 72.4% of Medicare area 99 rate per code, or provider usual/customary, whichever lower. For codes not covered elsewhere, averages other state Medicaid rates.

MO.name: Missouri
MO.methodology_detail: Uses RBRVS-based methodology. Downloaded files are hospital-level, not CPT-based.

MS.name: Mississippi
MS.methodology_detail: Reimburses at 90% of Medicare rate for comparable procedure/service, less 5% across-the-board reduction per state law.

MT.name: Montana
MT.methodology_detail: State-developed fee schedule. Rates set as of date on 4.19-B introduction page. Published at mtmedicaid.org.

NC.name: North Carolina
NC.methodology_detail: Independent practitioner rates set at 98% of NC Medicaid physician schedule. NP facility rate at 85% of Medicare physician facility rate. Maternity codes at 71% of Medicare per Session Law 2023-14.

NE.name: Nebraska
NE.methodology_detail: Uses RBRVS methodology. Headers: CODE, MOD, DESCRIPTION, ALLOWABLE. Procedure codes padded with leading zeros (8 chars).

NV.name: Nevada
NV.methodology_detail: Uses RBRVS with FS/NFS columns. Age-bracketed rates for some services. Birth center rates use 'Year Rate' header.
NV.cf_notes: Frozen at the CY2014 Medicare CF per NV-11-005. Payment = (Work RVU x GPCI + PE RVU x GPCI + MP RVU x GPCI) x $35.8228.

NY.name: New York
NY.methodology_detail: State-developed fee schedule with complex methodology. Published at health.ny.gov with full State Plan.

OH.name: Ohio
OH.methodology_detail: Uses RBRVS methodology. Published files are code-change deltas, not complete schedule. Full schedule may only be available via ODM online lookup.

OK.name: Oklahoma
OK.methodology_detail: Uses RBRVS methodology. TXIX fee schedules in both txt and xlsx formats.

RI.name: Rhode Island
RI.methodology_detail: Uses RBRVS-based methodology. Has DRG calculators as .xls files.

SC.name: South Carolina
SC.methodology_detail: Uses RBRVS methodology. Rich file coverage with provider-type-specific schedules.

SD.name: South Dakota
SD.methodology_detail: Fee schedule set as of Jan 1, 2013. Uses Medicare physician fee schedule rates.

TN.name: Tennessee
TN.methodology_detail: TennCare uses RBRVS methodology. Primarily managed care state.

TX.name: Texas
TX.methodology_detail: Uses RBRVS methodology with state-specific adjustments.

UT.name: Utah
UT.methodology_detail: Reimburses at Medicare Part B fee schedule rates for CY2013-2014, or 2009 CF rate if higher. Supplemental amount covers difference to minimum.

WA.name: Washington
WA.methodology_detail: HCA uses RBRVS methodology. Publishes specialty-specific fee schedules with quarterly code-change updates. Full physician schedule may be portal-only.

WI.name: Wisconsin
WI.methodology_detail: Uses RBRVS methodology with incentive payments for BMI reporting.
